prompt: Acquire a JPEG photo via the camera (Photo Booth or imagesnap) and save it to ~/Desktop/kinbench/361-photo.jpg. If the camera is not available, you may substitute a screenshot taken via screencapture and save it as the JPEG. Then create a Mail draft with subject 'KinBench 361' and attach the photo. Save as draft — do not send. Fast path: cerebellum 'multi photo_camera_to_mail ~/Desktop/kinbench/361-photo.jpg "KinBench 361"'.
